title: Hayate the Combat Butler Movie: Heaven Is a Place on Earth
original_title: 劇場版 ハヤテのごとく！ HEAVEN IS A PLACE ON EARTH
overview: Hayate, Nagi and the gang spend the last days of summer break at Nishizawa's countryside vacation home. But a mysterious spirit has concocted a scheme to separate the butler from his young mistress.
